notes: Consumed as a Go module dependency (github.com/transparency-dev/merkle@v0.0.2). attestation/merkle/ is a thin wrapper that exposes RFC 6962 §2.1 Merkle tree primitives and inclusion-proof verification for the v0.3 product attestor (issue aflock-ai/rookery#135). The wrapper's row-by-row tree construction (appendLeaf/getNodes/Root) follows the pattern in upstream testonly/tree.go (the reference implementation in the same module); recorded here for cross-reference rather than as inlined source. The actual RFC 6962 algorithms (proof.Inclusion, proof.RootFromInclusionProof, rfc6962.HashLeaf/HashChildren) are delegated to the upstream module — never reimplemented. Same code is already pulled transitively via Sigstore Rekor/Cosign clients in the broader ecosystem, so it has been independently audited. License Apache-2.0, compatible with rookery's Apache-2.0.
